name: Elizabeth Warren
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $1,385,014 for Elizabeth Warren in U.S. Senate, MA. Public statements and congressional records indicate this candidate has taken a stance aligned with Israel-focused security policy framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $1,385,014.
